creator: simon@olofsson.de
text:
ftp://ftp.freebsd.org/pub/FreeBSD/distfiles/libcaca-0.9.tar.gz
is the original tarball.
I don't see any changes...
Weird that the checksum and size changed.

On Thu, Sep 21, 2006 at 04:17:22PM +0000, Jeremy Messenger wrote:
> Do anyone have any of orignal tarball of it before it has changed? I need to
> know what they have made the changes. I am not going to commit it without the
> knowledge of changes.
